# arifOS - Constitutional Kernel for AI Agents

## Overview

arifOS is a constitutional kernel for AI agents, implementing a governance framework based on 13 floors of truth and verification.

## Repository

https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS

## Key Components

- **Kernel**: Constitutional rules (F1-F13)
- **MCP Server**: Runtime tool execution (arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com)
- **Sites**: Ring 1-3 (arif-fazil.com, arifos.arif-fazil.com, aaa.arif-fazil.com)

## Endpoints

- arifOS Kernel: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
- MCP Server: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
- Documentation: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com
- Ring 1 (Sovereign): https://arif-fazil.com
- Ring 2 (OS): https://arifos.arif-fazil.com
- Ring 3 (AAA): https://aaa.arif-fazil.com

## Constitutional Floors

The 13 floors (F1-F13) implement truth-power coupling:
- F1: AMANAH — Reversibility
- F2: TRUTH — Evidence required
- F3: TRI_WITNESS — W³ ≥ 0.95
- F4: CLARITY — Entropy ↓
- F0: The Scar — Authority must contract when uncertainty rises

## MCP Tools

All tools run through the MCP server with constitutional governance:
- File system operations
- Git operations
- Code execution
- Web search and fetch
- Deployment and infrastructure
